name: Landing Page & Product Webpage via Claude Design Gate
objective: Design and ship the product landing page and public webpage through a hi2vi_web-style Claude Design gate (design canvas + DesignSync + operator sign-off), following the hi2vi_web stack and edge-deploy patterns

review.note: Landing designed via the Claude Design gate + shipped: (marketing) landing at /, knowledge-web container + reworked edge routing, mkdocs retired. Design implemented AS-IS; routing kept the app at current paths (operator decision). Copy-fidelity gap deferred as D10; live edge apply owed to the operator.
